channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Iran holds a funeral procession for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei m…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Iran holds a funeral procession for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei more than four months after he was killed in U.S.-Israeli strikes. n.pr/3TjlGve
item.content:encoded: Iran holds a funeral procession for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei more than four months after he was killed in U.S.-Israeli strikes. n.pr/3TjlGve

item.title: Los Angeles-based vocalist, composer and producer Sharada Sh…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Los Angeles-based vocalist, composer and producer Sharada Shashidhar joined us on Bandcamp Selects to talk about her new album, A Foot on the Ground. Listen on Bandcamp Radio.
item.content:encoded: Los Angeles-based vocalist, composer and producer Sharada Shashidhar joined us on Bandcamp Selects to talk about her new album, A Foot on the Ground. Listen on Bandcamp Radio.

item.title: New & Notable: tj douglas has an incredible knack for instil…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: tj douglas has an incredible knack for instilling their songs with rich detail and easy melodies, and their latest is a sterling example.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: tj douglas has an incredible knack for instilling their songs with rich detail and easy melodies, and their latest is a sterling example.

item.title: This British comedy on Hulu centers on two 50-something best…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: This British comedy on Hulu centers on two 50-something best friends who turn on each other after he gets involved with her 26-year-old daughter. While the premise is juicy, it's also a tad yucky. n.pr/4ypa1vh
item.content:encoded: This British comedy on Hulu centers on two 50-something best friends who turn on each other after he gets involved with her 26-year-old daughter. While the premise is juicy, it's also a tad yucky. n.pr/4ypa1vh

item.title: Music can preserve more than melodies. Cocanha are reclaimin…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Music can preserve more than melodies. Cocanha are reclaiming the endangered Occitan language and culture through tradition, collaboration, and the powerful songs of Flame Folclòre.
item.content:encoded: Music can preserve more than melodies. Cocanha are reclaiming the endangered Occitan language and culture through tradition, collaboration, and the powerful songs of Flame Folclòre.

item.title: In June, a single with a hand-painted cover by the leaders o…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description:
In June, a single with a hand-painted cover by the leaders of the early-2000s garage rock revival sold for $25,000, making it the 5th most valuable vinyl ever sold on Discogs.

Dig deeper into the stories behind June's most valuable records: https://disc.gs/3QPlnro
item.content:encoded:
In June, a single with a hand-painted cover by the leaders of the early-2000s garage rock revival sold for $25,000, making it the 5th most valuable vinyl ever sold on Discogs.

Dig deeper into the stories behind June's most valuable records: https://disc.gs/3QPlnro

item.title: Australian prime minister apologizes for saying he'd have se…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Australian prime minister apologizes for saying he'd have sex with Kylie Minogue
item.content:encoded: Australian prime minister apologizes for saying he'd have sex with Kylie Minogue

item.title: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special pl…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers.
item.content:encoded: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers.

item.title: The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start agains…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium in a Round of 16 match after a surprise decision by FIFA to allow him to play despite receiving a red card last week.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium in a Round of 16 match after a surprise decision by FIFA to allow him to play despite receiving a red card last week.

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: Federal agents tried to track David Streever to his home and…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Federal agents tried to track David Streever to his home and hotel, and left him a warning notice that a critical email he sent the former head of ICE may have been illegal. Now he's suing. n.pr/4goBOVU
item.content:encoded: Federal agents tried to track David Streever to his home and hotel, and left him a warning notice that a critical email he sent the former head of ICE may have been illegal. Now he's suing. n.pr/4goBOVU

item.title: The great UK producer James Ellis Ford announces 'Lost In An…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The great UK producer James Ellis Ford announces 'Lost In Another World', the new album that he recorded in the hospital, during leukemia treatment; hear the serene "Overtones"
item.content:encoded: The great UK producer James Ellis Ford announces 'Lost In Another World', the new album that he recorded in the hospital, during leukemia treatment; hear the serene "Overtones"

item.title: "What’s so great about this album is that it’s not perfect. …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
"What’s so great about this album is that it’s not perfect. It’s not lined up with Pro Tools. It’s organic.”

Weezer's Rivers Cuomo, Patrick Wilson, Brian Bell, and Scott Shriner go deep on 'The Gold Album'
item.content:encoded:
"What’s so great about this album is that it’s not perfect. It’s not lined up with Pro Tools. It’s organic.”

Weezer's Rivers Cuomo, Patrick Wilson, Brian Bell, and Scott Shriner go deep on 'The Gold Album'

item.title: "Reverend Ray" Broshears founded the queer vigilante group t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: "Reverend Ray" Broshears founded the queer vigilante group the Lavender Panthers in 1973. The group's impact is still felt today. n.pr/4va7li1
item.content:encoded: "Reverend Ray" Broshears founded the queer vigilante group the Lavender Panthers in 1973. The group's impact is still felt today. n.pr/4va7li1

item.title: A new PBS documentary, 'Woody Guthrie and the Ghost of Tom J…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description: A new PBS documentary, 'Woody Guthrie and the Ghost of Tom Joad Today,' revisits his work in the 1930s and 1940s and shows how it's connected to today's aggressive ICE enforcement under President Donald Trump.
item.content:encoded: A new PBS documentary, 'Woody Guthrie and the Ghost of Tom Joad Today,' revisits his work in the 1930s and 1940s and shows how it's connected to today's aggressive ICE enforcement under President Donald Trump.

item.title: Philip Glass' newest symphony, an homage to Abraham Lincoln,…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Philip Glass' newest symphony, an homage to Abraham Lincoln, was supposed to premiere at the Kennedy Center — until it didn't. And then, the Boston Symphony Orchestra stepped in. n.pr/4y1iOmF
item.content:encoded: Philip Glass' newest symphony, an homage to Abraham Lincoln, was supposed to premiere at the Kennedy Center — until it didn't. And then, the Boston Symphony Orchestra stepped in. n.pr/4y1iOmF

item.title: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean — are dealing with the aftermath of intense winds and severe flooding from Super Typhoon Bavi.
item.content:encoded: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean — are dealing with the aftermath of intense winds and severe flooding from Super Typhoon Bavi.

item.title: The Belgian soccer federation is challenging FIFA's ruling t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Belgian soccer federation is challenging FIFA's ruling to let Balogun play despite getting a red card in his previous game. Belgium's statement came just 11 hours before kickoff in Seattle. European soccer body UEFA criticizes FIFA's "incomprehensible and unjustifiable decision." n.pr/4vyVgU1
item.content:encoded: The Belgian soccer federation is challenging FIFA's ruling to let Balogun play despite getting a red card in his previous game. Belgium's statement came just 11 hours before kickoff in Seattle. European soccer body UEFA criticizes FIFA's "incomprehensible and unjustifiable decision." n.pr/4vyVgU1

item.title: How do you find victory in defeat? On paper, Cape Verde’s …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
How do you find victory in defeat?

On paper, Cape Verde’s 3-2 loss to Argentina on Friday, “To see the commitment and the resiliency with the players and the pride, made us proud,” said Paulo De Barros, president of the Cape Verdean Association of Boston.

via @wgbh.org
item.content:encoded:
How do you find victory in defeat?

On paper, Cape Verde’s 3-2 loss to Argentina on Friday, “To see the commitment and the resiliency with the players and the pride, made us proud,” said Paulo De Barros, president of the Cape Verdean Association of Boston.

via @wgbh.org

item.title: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones targeting Kyiv …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones targeting Kyiv early Monday that killed at least 11 people, authorities said. n.pr/4gsRA2d
item.content:encoded: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones targeting Kyiv early Monday that killed at least 11 people, authorities said. n.pr/4gsRA2d
